Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Appeal Of Order Denying Petition To Compel Arbitration, By Defendants Oakmont Management Group Llc; Well Oak Tenant, Llc Dba The Ivy At Golden Gate; Welltower Trs Holdco, Llc; Welltower Op Llc; Welltower, Inc; And Ivy Living, Llc
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS PENDING APPEAL OF ORDER DENYING PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' (OAKMONT MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC, WELLTOWER TRS HOLDCO LLC, WELLTOWER OP LLC, WELLTOWER INC, IVY LIVING LLC, WELL OAK TENANT, LLC DBA THE IVY AT GOLDEN GATE) motion for stay of proceedings pending appeal is DENIED.

After the passage of Code of Civil Procedure, section 1294(a), a perfected appeal of an order denying a motion to compel arbitration does not automatically stay proceedings in the trial court. Rather, the decision to stay the trial court proceedings is left to the court's discretion. Factors for a discretionary stay are "(1) whether the stay applicant has made a strong showing he is likely to succeed on the merits; (2) whether the applicant will be irreparably injured absent a stay; (3) whether issuance of a stay will substantially injure the other parties interested in the proceeding; and (4) where the public interest lies." (Nken v. Holder (2009) 556 U.S. 418, 434).

Here, defendants' moving papers do not meaningfully discuss any of these factors. Defendants do not show a likelihood of prevailing on appeal or irreparable harm. Moreover, a stay would substantially prejudice plaintiff, who is elderly and infirm and has already obtained a trial preference order. Lastly, defendants do not demonstrate that public policy factors weigh in favor of granting a stay under the circumstances of this case.

Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Hearing held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS OAKMONT MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC, WELLTOWER TRS HOLDCO LLC, WELLTOWER OP LLC, WELLTOWER INC, IVY LIVING LLC, and WELL OAK TENANT, LLC's, DBA THE IVY AT GOLDEN GATE, Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion For Stay.

Defendants' petition to compel arbitration and motion for stay of this case pending completion of arbitration proceedings are denied.

The evidence shows that Sandy Stefancic, not Betty Sun, put her initials at the end of section m on page 31 of the residence agreement. Defendants have not provided any evidence showing that when Stefancic put her initials at the end of section m she had either actual or ostensible authority to do so on behalf of Sun. Accordingly, defendants have failed to meet their burden of showing that there is a valid agreement to arbitrate binding on Sun.

Order is signed.
